context: Evaluates the agent's ability to identify a binding decision in a context file, create a properly formatted ADR with frontmatter, link the source in context:, and run the post-creation index regeneration.

checklist.name: Decision extraction
checklist.description: Binding decision correctly identified from the context file

checklist.name: ADR frontmatter correct
checklist.description: ADR frontmatter includes title (ADR-NNN: prefix), status, date, and context: fields per schema

checklist.name: Source context linked
checklist.description: context: field links to the source .context/ file

checklist.name: Body structure
checklist.description: ADR body has Context, Decision, and Consequences sections
